stories.title: **Aaron Judge Records 500th Career Extra-Base Hit — Most Historic Start in Yankees History**

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Aaron Judge has now recorded 5 HRs and 15 RBIs in his first 6 games of 2026.

No player in MLB history has ever done that.

He also has his 500th career extra-base hit. The Yankees are 5-1.

The man is operating on a different level. 🏆

#Yankees #MLB #AaronJudge

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Aaron Judge's 999th game as a Yankee: 3-run HR. 500th career extra-base hit.

Third-fastest Yankee ever (by games) to reach 500 XBH.

And tomorrow? His 1,000th Yankee game — one HR would tie Babe Ruth's record.

This month is going to be something. 👀

#Yankees #MLB

article.headline: Aaron Judge Records 500th Career Extra-Base Hit — First in MLB History With 5 HR and 15 RBI in Team's First 6 Games

stories.title: **Konnor Griffin Called Up — No. 1 Overall Prospect Makes MLB Debut**

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Konnor Griffin is now in the majors.

The Pirates called up MLB's No. 1 overall prospect on Thursday.

He was hitting .438 in Triple-A across 5 games. They'd seen enough.

Selected 9th overall in 2024. This is what you've been waiting for.

#Pirates #MLB #KonnorGriffin

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Konnor Griffin: MLB Pipeline's No. 1 overall prospect.

Called up by Pittsburgh.

7-for-16 in Triple-A. Called up after 5 games.

The future of the Pittsburgh Pirates is in uniform. Watch this.

#Pirates #MLB

stories.title: **2026 Rookie Class Is Historic — DeLauter, Murakami, McGonigle, Stewart All Making Marks**

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The 2026 rookie class through 6 games:

🔥 DeLauter: HR in first 3 games (3rd player ever)
🔥 Murakami: same (4th ever)
🔥 McGonigle: 4-hit debut, .364 AVG
🔥 Wetherholt: walk-off single
🔥 Stewart: cleanup hitter, NL ROTW

This class is going to be remembered.

#MLB #Rookies

stories.title: **Miami Marlins Surge to 5-1 — Unexpected NL East Leaders**

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Miami Marlins are 5-1.

They're leading the NL East.

Alcantara just threw a 93-pitch complete game shutout in a 10-0 win.

Every projection had them rebuilding. The Marlins didn't get the memo.

#Marlins #MLB

stories.title: **Reds' Rotation in Trouble — Greene Until July, Lodolo Rehabbing From Blister**

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The Cincinnati Reds are 3-3 and already missing their two best starting pitchers.

Hunter Greene: out until at least July (right elbow surgery).
Nick Lodolo: on the IL with a finger blister, rehabbing now.

The 2026 Reds rotation just got a lot shorter.

#Reds #MLB

stories.title: **DeLauter and Stewart Win First Player of Week Awards — Rookies Make History**

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Chase DeLauter won the AL Player of the Week.
Sal Stewart won the NL Player of the Week.

Both rookies. Both winning the FIRST awards of the 2026 season.

That's only happened ONE other time in MLB history.

The rookie class is real. 🔥

#MLB #Rookies
